adversarial-tester.reason: Distinct failure-mode test generation for build Phase 3. Produces 3-5 targeted tests per mode. No overlap with red-team (single artifact) or audit (existing code).

audit.reason: 4 parallel analysis lenses (correctness, robustness, consistency, architecture) on existing code. Distinct from red-team, inquisitor, and prospector.

build.reason: Core 4-phase orchestrator with contract-aware dispatch (/spec consumption), defect signature loading from cartographer, and refactor mode. Dispatches 11+ sub-skills. All cross-references resolve.

cartographer-skill.reason: Living codebase knowledge store with defect-signatures subsystem. 3 modes (record/consult/load) plus defect signature recording. Tight integration with debugging Phase 4.5 and build Phase 3. Distinct from project-init and forge.

code-review.reason: Post-implementation weighted review (Fatal=3, Significant=1) with iterative fix loop. Fresh reviewer each round. Distinct from red-team and quality-gate.

debugging.reason: 5+ phase investigation pipeline with Phase 4.5 'Where Else?' blast radius scan and defect signature persistence via cartographer recorder. Cross-references to cartographer and quality-gate all resolve.

design.reason: Pre-implementation exploration with contract emission, cartographer consult, forge feed-forward. Related skills list now includes crucible:build. Distinct from planning and build.

finish.reason: 7-step completion workflow with 4 merge options. Unique decision-gate for work completion. Distinct from code-review (pre-completion) and build (orchestrator).

forge-skill.reason: Retrospective/feed-forward pattern tracking. 3 modes (retrospective, feed-forward, mutation). Deviation pattern pruning. Unique learning loop across tasks.

getting-started.reason: Skill ecosystem entry point mapping user actions to skill invocation. Priority guidance. Distinct from project-init (repo onboarding).

innovate.reason: Single-shot divergent creativity injection on finalized designs/plans. Always followed by quality-gate. Distinct from design (exploratory).

inquisitor.reason: 5 parallel adversarial dimensions (wiring, integration, edge cases, state/lifecycle, regression) against full feature diff. Cross-component focus. Build Phase 4.

mock-to-unity.reason: 5-layer UI Toolkit implementation (structure, USS, C# workarounds, behavior, verification). Mandatory translation map checkpoint. Distinct from mockup-builder and ui-verify.

mockup-builder.reason: HTML/CSS visual reference with rigid Unity constraints (CSS variables only, flexbox, BEM). Translation Notes section. Distinct from mock-to-unity (implementation) and ui-verify (verification).

parallel.reason: Coordination pattern for independent parallel work. Each agent scoped with goal, constraints, output. Verification step. Distinct from build (sequential phases).

pathfinder.reason: 4 modes (full-scan, query, crawl, diff) for cross-repo dependency analysis. Contract extraction/verification. Extensive compaction recovery. Unique scope: codebase topology mapping.

planning.reason: Bite-sized TDD task structure with exact file paths. Refactoring tasks with atomic metadata and consumer migration. Distinct from design (exploration) and build (execution).

project-init.reason: Tier 1 single-repo deep scan with partition explorers. Tier 2 cross-repo discovery. CLAUDE.md proposal filtering. Distinct from cartographer (persists exploration) and pathfinder (traces dependencies).

prospector.reason: Root cause analysis with ROI scoring, friction genealogy, and 3 competing design agents. Trajectory tracking across runs. Clear distinction from audit (bugs vs structural improvements). Build refactor handoff correctly referenced.

quality-gate.reason: Two-layer stagnation: orchestrator scoring (Fatal=3, Significant=1) plus dedicated Sonnet judge for semantic comparison. Three judge verdicts (PROGRESS, STAGNATION, DIMINISHING_RETURNS). Fix memory with anti-anchoring. Progress notifications at rounds 5/8/11/14, 15-round safety limit. Judge prompt file verified on disk.

red-team.reason: Devil's Advocate dispatch with fresh reviewer each round. Dual mode (single-pass vs full loop). Stagnation criteria: Fatal strictly lower OR weighted lower AND Fatal lower-or-equal. Distinct from quality-gate (loop manager).

review-feedback.reason: Pre-implementation feedback verification (technical correctness, test impact, legacy reasons). No performative agreement. YAGNI check. Distinct from code-review (writes review).

skill-creator.reason: Skill lifecycle management (draft, test, evaluate, improve). 4 test case org. eval_metadata.json with grading. Benchmark aggregation. Orthogonal to all other skills.

spec.reason: Autonomous epic-to-spec pipeline producing design docs, implementation plans, and machine-readable contracts per ticket. No overlap with /design (interactive, single-ticket) or /build (consumer). All cross-references resolve. Both prompt templates exist on disk.

stocktake.reason: Ecosystem health assessment with overlap, scope, actionability, cross-reference checks. Quick scan and full modes. Results cached. Orthogonal to all other skills.

test-coverage.reason: Post-change test staleness audit (update, delete, coincidence categories). Multi-batch dispatch. Revert-on-failure. Distinct from adversarial-tester (new tests) and TDD (process).

test-driven-development.reason: Red-green-refactor discipline enforcement. Mandatory verify red/green. Rationalization prevention. Foundational practice applied by other skills.

ui-verify.reason: Mockup-vs-implementation verification with 3 checklist categories. Step-by-step comparison (capture, visual diff, code audit, delta report). Distinct from mockup-builder and mock-to-unity.

verify.reason: Evidence-before-claims enforcement. Gate function (identify, run, read, verify). Red flags for rationalization. Foundational integrity practice across all skills.

worktree.reason: Isolated workspace creation with directory priority, safety verification, auto-detected setup. Called by design, build, and any skill needing isolation.
